title: haageocereus limensis
intro: Haageocereus limensis, also known as the Peruvian old lady cactus or Puya cactus, is a type of cactus native to Peru. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Haageocereus limensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even have antiviral and antifungal effects. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and creams, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
